g.text: AI agent ops on your phone

svg.text: Full VT100 over Citadel. Jump hosts, keys, agents — all of it.
Edit live on the remote box
Open, edit, save without ever leaving SSH. Directory picker built in.
Preview localhost on mobile · forward any port and inspect the response in the in-app browser

g.text: Want me to prune older than 30d?

svg.text: No Telegram bot to babysit. Direct, encrypted, push to your lock screen.
Per-server, sticky. Run on a schedule, run now, or pause from the lock screen.
Push when work finishes · agents notify you the moment a job lands
